Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aethertech eye]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Omega possesses an Aethertech eye that blazes orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — An Aethertech eye can flare orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Omega has an Aethertech eye that shines orange.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Omega possesses an Aethertech eye used for peering through gun sights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Omega possesses an Aethertech eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Omega has an Aethertech eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Omega's Aethertech eye gleams orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Light has an Aethertech eye.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — An Aethertech eye is a gleaming orange ocular enhancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Omega has an Aethertech eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Omega has an Aethertech eye that shines bright orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Omega possesses an Aethertech eye that can trace future paths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Omega has an Aethertech eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Omega possesses an Aethertech eye.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
